video.title: GC Leaders Fight It Out On First Mountain Finish! | Giro D'Italia 2022 Stage 9 Highlights

transcript.clean_text: the first serious test of the jedi italia came on day nine with a huge stage in the apennines following on from a day racing around nables where thomas again proved he could do it in the mountains ten years before and then at the seaside juan pelopez held onto the pink jersey leonard kempner was the closest on gc at 38 seconds rain tatami at 58 with simon yates the best place of the serious contenders the mayella massif awaited the geropolitan blockhouse a fort established in unification times home to the jitter the italia's ninth stage it would be a hard start in izernia riders run the rollers getting last-minute instructions those who got their way back into the gc were hoping to keep their place and the big favourites ready for the first important battle five categorized climbs with juanpe lopez the 24 year old from southern spain hoping to hang on in one of the last southern stages of the judo d'italia blockhouse the mountain that discovered eddie merks as a gc contender in the late 1960s with an ascent from its hardest side from roca moriche after the climbing of paso and channel up and down all day almost 200 kilometers as well not many harder finishes than this in the giro d'italia 13 kilometers with a maximum gradient of 14 rarely dipping below 9. it was an upbeat start to say the least there was a threat of it really exploding with a couple of big gc teams trying to get riders up the road matthew holmes took the first valico del macherone king of the mountains point then it would be the turn of diego rosa he'd been out in a breakaway that didn't amount to much the other day today would be a different matter a crash behind of the peloton saw pay your bill bow hit the ground he needed a few running repairs it was always going to be a hard day for him after that but also would take maximum points on the second of the categorized climbs of the day and eventually a group of nine riders established a lead at the front of the race with around 150 kilometers to go they had almost six minutes of an advantage tesfacion was involved but that would soon change jonathan castro viejo going to work for the ineos grenadiers they were intent on making the race hard the front of the race kept changing drawn up at androni jocatly where one of the teams with numbers teslacion being joined by a teammate in sepulveda but rosa would soon at the front again and he'd take maximum points over paso that would take him into the king of the mountains jersey a nightmare moment followed not now testion leading the race but crashing there were initial worries for his safety he was back to his feet assessed by the doctors and would be back on his bike but he'd lost the lead of the race joe dambrosky was trying to make his way up but the breakaway was running out of time the peloton was hungry for action rosa caught the last to be caught it was game on in the general classification with only blockhouse left to climb juliachi corny the first of the big casualties wilco kelderman suffered a mechanical and then with 12 kilometers to go simon yates off the back his right knee strapped up still obviously suffering the effects of that crash on etna there was almost a crash climbing uphill juan pelopez with a touch of wheels forced to briefly stop he'd be back on his bike but the maliarosa losing contact with the main group richie port was going to work on the front the only teammate left for anybody really borihanska are trying to keep two men in the group but they've been following port set the pace calapas attacked valdez and lander immediately the ones to follow vincenzo nibely and alejandro valverde have been riding fantastically well despite their advancing years domenico puts avivo in that category two and they'd only be at ten seconds with lander balde and carapaz unable to really make too much of a difference juanpei lopez was battling away it looked like he was on his way to losing the mallarosa but there was a little bit of a stalemate at the front into the last kilometer six men would come together and at the end of a testing ascent of blockhouse the final corner was soon upon them and it'd be jai hindley who would lead them up the hill calapas was gaining valdez was having to come around after he lost positioning on that last corner hinley was just about in front and that's how it stayed to the line hindley valdez cara paz with lander followed by almeida and domenico pots of evil at his 16th judo jai hindley winning for the first time since he won at the giro two years ago the first victory in his brand new colors and then look at this one minute 46 seconds later juan pelope is coming across the line and just about holding on to the mayarosa the performance of the young man's career so far hindley taking the bonus seconds juanpe lopez holding on by 12 seconds hindley balder cara pass lander and almeida porzovivo buchmann the top 10 all separated by less than a minute huge moments of celebration relief and an outpouring of emotion for 24 year old juan pedro lopez from the south of spain against all the odds holding on to the malaya rosa he leads by 12 seconds now over joao almeida who's previously held the jersey valdez on the gc podium karapas hindley mata and land they're all in the top seven with ports of evo buchmann and bilbao in the top 10. the gc is set king of the mountains competitions under the way and diego rosa leads by 14 points from kuhn balman leonard kemner is up there as well the jitter italia takes on its second rest day when it returns on tuesday it'll be stage 10 a stage up the coast of two half really flat along the coastline and then into the marquee going through michaelis caraponi's hometown of philotrano before finishing in yeezy with a couple of climbs towards the end 196 kilometers for stage 10 of the judo a different zero begins now the gc has had a real shake out we've lost some of the big names but many more are still in contention off to week two proper we'll see you then you
